# searxng
Description: Full-featured SearXNG metasearch skill. Search the web, images, news, videos, files, science, and more via the NeuroClaw SearXNG instance. Aggregates Google, Brave, DuckDuckGo, Bing, Wikipedia and dozens more. Use this for any live web research, image discovery, news, or OSINT work.
Source: project
Triggers: web search, searxng, image search, news search, osint, find sources online
Tools: run_skill_script
Scripts: searxng.py
# SearXNG â€” Metasearch Skill

Multi-engine, multi-category search via the NeuroClaw SearXNG proxy.  
Backed by: Google, Brave, DuckDuckGo, Bing, Wikipedia, Startpage, and more.

---

## Quick Start

```bash
# Web search
python searxng.py "open source AI agents"

# Image search
python searxng.py "neon tokyo street" --category images

# News (last 24h)
python searxng.py "AI regulation news" --category news --time day

# Video search
python searxng.py "python async tutorial" --category videos

# Science / academic
python searxng.py "transformer architecture 2024" --category science

# IT / developer search
python searxng.py "rust async runtime comparison" --category it

# File search
python searxng.py "machine learning dataset csv" --category files

# Raw JSON output (for programmatic use)
python searxng.py "climate data" --json

# Paginate
python searxng.py "LLM benchmarks" --page 2

# Limit results
python searxng.py "best mechanical keyboards" --limit 5

# Engine-specific (target specific engines)
python searxng.py "site:reddit.com valorant" --engines duckduckgo,brave

# Safe search
python searxng.py "kids science projects" --safesearch 2
```

---

## Categories

| Category       | Description                                      |
|----------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| `general`      | Web pages, articles, docs â€” default              |
| `images`       | Photos, graphics, visual content + image URLs    |
| `news`         | News articles with dates, combine with `--time`  |
| `videos`       | Video results with thumbnails and duration       |
| `files`        | Documents, downloads, torrents                   |
| `music`        | Tracks, artists, albums                          |
| `it`           | Programming Q&A, package registries, code        |
| `science`      | Academic papers, scholarly results               |
| `social media` | Posts, profiles from social engines              |
| `map`          | Geo-tagged results with coordinates              |

---

## All Options

| Flag              | Values                        | Description                          |
|-------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| `--category`, `-c`| see table above               | Category (default: general)          |
| `--time`, `-t`    | `day`, `month`, `year`        | Time range filter                    |
| `--page`, `-p`    | integer                       | Page number (default: 1)             |
| `--limit`, `-l`   | integer                       | Max results (client-side cap)        |
| `--language`      | `en-US`, `de-DE`, etc.        | Language filter                      |
| `--engines`       | `brave,duckduckgo,bing`       | Comma-separated engine list          |
| `--safesearch`    | `0`, `1`, `2`                 | Off / Moderate / Strict              |
| `--json`          | flag                          | Raw JSON output                      |
| `--quiet`         | flag                          | Summary only (no per-result detail)  |

---

## Output Formats

**General / News / IT / Science:**
```
[1] Title of the Result
    https://example.com/article
    Snippet or description text...
    Source: example.com | Engine: duckduckgo | Date: 2026-05-01
```

**Images:**
```
[1] Image Title
    Page:      https://example.com/gallery
    Image URL: https://example.com/full-image.jpg
    Thumb:     https://example.com/thumb.jpg
    Resolution: 1920x1080 | Source: example.com
```

**Videos:**
```
[1] Video Title
    https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
    Duration: 12:34 | Source: YouTube
    Description snippet...
```

**Files:**
```
[1] Dataset Title
    https://example.com/data.csv
    Size: 45 MB | Type: csv | Source: example.com
```

---

## Notes

- Results are deduplicated across engines by the proxy
- `unresponsive_engines` are listed in the summary â€” partial results are normal
- Image URLs are normalized: protocol-relative `//host/path` â†’ `https://host/path`
- Pagination only works on engines that support deep pagination
- Use `--json` to get the full raw envelope for programmatic processing
- Direct answers (calculators, conversions) are shown at the top if available
- Infoboxes (Wikipedia panels, Wikidata) are included in `--json` output

---

## Agent Usage Pattern

```python
# Via run_skill_script
run_skill_script(
    skill_name="searxng",
    script="searxng.py",
    args=["your query here", "--category", "news", "--time", "day", "--limit", "10"]
)
```

Returns stdout as text â€” read it, then synthesize for the user.
